indication: Obtained at the one-time outpatient cardiology consultation (atypical chest discomfort / risk assessment). See cardiology consult note (NOTE_HX_003).
findings: Rate 76 bpm. Rhythm: NORMAL SINUS. Uniform P waves; PR 156 ms; QRS 86 ms; QTc 428 ms. Normal axis. No left ventricular hypertrophy by voltage criteria. No ST-segment or T-wave abnormality. No conduction disease.
impression: NORMAL SINUS RHYTHM. No evidence of ischemia, chamber enlargement, or conduction disease. This is the earliest ECG on file and documents NO prior atrial fibrillation — a pre-admission baseline for comparison with the perioperative tracings.
comparison: No earlier ECG available. Compared prospectively with the 6/10/2027 preop ECG (sinus), 6/11/2027 POD#1 ECG (sinus), and 6/14/2027 POD#4 ECG (atrial fibrillation).
